response.overview: A gripping political crime drama centered on systemic corruption and the aggressive power struggles within regional leadership. The story is a satirical critique heavily inspired by the real-life 1988 assassination of prominent Vijayawada political leader Vangaveeti Mohana Ranga. Following a fearless protagonist who stands up against dangerous political syndicates, the film explores the resulting societal unrest, public outrage, and the high-stakes battle for justice against a compromised administration.
response.title: Sahasame Naa Oopiri
